scope: Integrity Sentinel / Coverage Curator / Artifact Librarian agents + severity-based quality_queue enqueue + escalation rule.

agents.name: integrity_sentinel_agent
agents.behavior: Detects PIT violations, stale panels, schema drift → emits LibraryIntegrityPacketV1 keyed by severity.

agents.name: coverage_curator_agent
agents.behavior: Detects cohort / universe coverage gaps → emits CoverageGapPacketV1.

agents.name: artifact_librarian_agent
agents.behavior: Enqueues quality_queue job when severity ∈ {medium, high}; marks high-severity packets as escalated.

severity_policy.high: packet + quality_queue job + status=escalated (blocks further ingest until resolved).

coverage: integrity sentinel triages three violation kinds with correct severity
coverage curator emits one packet per cohort gap
librarian enqueues medium severity exactly once
